headline: Jim Cramer Compares the Current Selloff in Abbott Labs to the 1999 Market Environment
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) was one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer shared his take, explaining that dot-com analogies do not hold up in this market. Cramer highlighted it as one of the “greatest American companies,” as he said: …Let’s talk about some similarities that have now been popping up, okay? In 1999, we saw […]
